name: When do I actually need to hire a biohazard cleanup company instead of just cleaning it myself?

mainEntity.name: When do I actually need to hire a biohazard cleanup company instead of just cleaning it myself?

acceptedAnswer.text: You need professional biohazard cleanup after unattended deaths, suicide, blood trauma scenes, drug contamination (fentanyl/meth), infectious outbreaks, sewage, animal hoarding, or crime scenes. Standard cleaning cannot safely remove biological contaminants like blood, bodily fluids, or decomposition that pose serious health risks.
acceptedAnswer.description: You need professional biohazard cleanup after unattended deaths, suicide, blood trauma, drug contamination, infectious outbreaks, sewage, animal hoarding, or crime scenes.
